quote: Your boss cannot give you more work if you do not finish the work you have.
author: Moeny

quote: You will never disappoint your parents, if they already expect absolutely nothing.
author: Moeny

quote: I love my job, only when I am on vacation.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: Why do today, when there's tomorrow?
author: Moeny

quote: How can you make sure you never miss your target? Shoot first, and whatever you hit, call it the target.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: Sleep first, problems later.
author: Moeny

quote: Being lazy is just being calm.
author: Moeny

quote: Doing nothing today is just saving energy for tomorrow.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: If you don't try, you won't fail.
author: Moeny

quote: Resting all day is still a plan.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: At the end of the, the day ends.
author: Moeny

quote: The future is tomorrow, but today is now and if you walk far enough you'll be somewhere else.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: When you're speaking, you're no longer silent.
author: Moeny

quote: When nothing makes sense, add more nothing.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: The key to success is losing the key.
author: Moeny

quote: When the door is closed, open it.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: If you can't sleep at night, you are awake.
author: Moeny

quote: There are no stupid questions, just stupid people.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: Study is temporary, dumb is forever
author: Moeny

quote: If you want to see, open your eyes.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: If you forget something, just remember it.
author: Moeny

quote: If a failure doesn't let you learn, then be a failure.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: They'll call you a racist but never a lair.
author: Moeny

quote: If you want to be successful, just be successful.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: If you don't know what to do, do nothing.
author: Moeny

quote: The best way to predict the future is to create it, but the best way to create the future is to wait for it.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: You miss 100% of the shots you dont take, you also miss 100% of the if your dont have arms or legs
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: You're tired when you are about to go sleep, but you are also tired when you wake up, whats the point in sleeping?
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: My girlfriend complains about her migraines, so I suggest she take medication, but then she complains when it doesn't work right away.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: Two intelligent people cannot fall in love, true love needs one idiot.
author: Moeny

quote: People don't want the truth, they just want a confortable lie.
author: Moeny

quote: The more you weight, the harder you are to kidnap.
author: Moeny

quote: If you can't convince them, confuse them.
author: Moeny

quote: If you are reading this, it means you can see.
author: Moeny

quote: If you wake up early, it means you didn't wake up late.
author: Moeny

quote: The reason you're hungry is because you haven't eaten.
author: Moeny

quote: Yesterday is history, tomorrow is a mystery, but today is a gift, that's why it's called the present.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: Man who laughs at your plan, has no plan himself.
author: Moeny

quote: Appear weak when you are strong, and busy when you are useless.
author: Moeny

quote: When the plan fails, do nothing, it was not your plan.
author: Moeny

quote: The enemy can't predict you, if you don't know what you are doing.
author: Moeny

quote: If you wake up tired, go back to sleep and try again.
author: Moeny

quote: To stay invisible, simply don't go outside.
author: Moeny

quote: Face your problem unless the problem is your face.
author: Moeny

quote: A wise man once said nothing, because he forgot what he was going to say.
author: Moeny

quote: If you turn a page to the right, you are looking at the next page.
author: Moeny

quote: If you are standing on one leg, you are not standing on two legs.
author: Moeny

quote: If you have kidney stones, eat paper it beats stone.
author: Moeny

quote: They say chase your dream, so I sleep agian.
author: Moeny

quote: A person who is standing behind you, is not in front of you.
author: Moeny

quote: The reason you are here, is because you are not somewhere else.
author: Moeny

quote: If your cup is empty, it is because there is nothing inside of it.
author: Moeny

quote: Until the lion learns how to write, every story will glorify the hunter.
author: Ollie the Dolly

quote: Laziness is the mother of all bad habits, but ultimately she is a mother and we should respect her.
author: Moeny

quote: Why fix problems, when you are the problem?
author: Moeny

quote: The greatest skill is not talent, it is acting busy while doing nothing.
author: Moeny

quote: Joe Mama
author: Moeny

quote: A confused man is harder to defeat, because he doesn't know what to do.
author: Moeny

quote: If a rat steals a crown, does it become the king of squeakdom?

quote: They are always hating on the white people, but always wanna live in a white country.
